data.description_suggestion: Forwards an SMS message to a specified recipient. Requires authentication via API key. Accepts the message content and destination phone number as input parameters. Returns a confirmation response with the message ID and delivery status. This operation creates a new outbound SMS transmission and may incur usage charges based on your FireText account plan.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new sub-account under your account

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new reusable SMS message template for your account. Requires template name and message content in the request body. data.summary_suggestion: Send SMS message using GET request
data.description_suggestion: Sends an SMS message to one or more recipients using HTTP GET parameters. Requires authentication via API key. Side effects: reduces account credit balance and creates message record in sent messages log.
